title: Move item to another group when deadline is at deadline time or overdue
excerpt: We would like the ability to set a date column with deadline mode enabled, then create an automation which moves the item to another group when the deadline is met/overdue

posts.author: IoTBlackbelt (Ross)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like the ability to set a date column with deadline mode enabled, then create an automation which moves the item to another group when the deadline is met/overdue

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Perhaps I’m misunderstanding your request, but that is already available with this recipe automation.

image905×549 12.4 KB

posts.author: IoTBlackbelt (Ross)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorry, I should have provided more info. In the ‘when’ area you can only select a static time or a time every day rather then it automatically moving the item when the deadline is met.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m still struggling to understand your issue then. If you have a date column that is the deadline, then you would just use the above automation and then use that column as the ‘date’ option?
